text.title: Domain-Driven Design (DDD) Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema (draft-07) that pins the shape of a valid spec artefact for arch-pattern-ddd. Subagents validate against this before returning.

example.note: Owner plural; bounded_contexts empty; aggregate missing invariants; glossary too small.

forbidden.pattern: `bounded_contexts` has fewer than 2 entries — DDD without bounded contexts is just OO.
`aggregates[].invariants` empty — aggregate without invariants has no consistency boundary.
`glossary` has fewer than 5 terms — ubiquitous language requires explicit vocabulary.
